evals.name: full_handover_package
evals.prompt: Create the handover package for our completed banking discovery engagement
expectations: Validates Gate 3 approval before proceeding
Includes executive transition summary with approved scenario
Covers commercial activation package with pricing structure
Generates 90-day kickoff plan with Sprint 0 detail

evals.name: commercial_only
evals.prompt: The client only wants the commercial proposal from the discovery
expectations: Generates only S1 (executive summary) and S2 (commercial package)
Marks S3-S7 as pending post-closure
Includes pricing structure and closing timeline
Derives narrative from executive pitch deliverable

evals.name: governance_transition
evals.prompt: Prepare the governance transition from discovery to execution team
expectations: Maps discovery roles to execution roles
Defines ceremony structure for execution phase
Includes escalation path with response times
Covers stakeholder transition matrix

evals.name: risk_assumption_tracker
evals.prompt: Create the assumption validation tracker from our discovery findings
expectations: Operationalizes pivot points from Phase 4
Includes validation proposals with deadlines and owners
Defines kill criteria with numeric thresholds
Covers early warning indicators for inherited risks

evals.name: missing_deliverables
evals.prompt: Generate handover but we only ran the quick reference pipeline (Phases 1, 3, 5b)
expectations: Produces simplified handover with S1 + S2 + S6 only
Omits 90-day plan due to incomplete pipeline
Documents which phases were skipped and impact
Flags limitations of the abbreviated handover
